The '''''Tinta Rainbow''''' was a [[Passenger liner/Legends|spaceliner]] operated by [[Tinta Lines]].

==Appearances==
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*[[I, Jedi (abridged audiobook)|''I, Jedi'' abridged audiobook]]
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{Mo}}
*[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial (abridged audiobook)|''The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}}
